SEARCH

All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
AngleComparator
Comparator that sorts points by angle around a center hospital.
CanvasResizeListener
Listener that redraws the canvas when it is resized.
CLIUtils
Utility class used by the command line interface.
CommandLineMain
Entry point of the command line version of the application.
DistanceComparator
Comparator that sorts points by distance to a reference point
FileCommands
Handles command line operations related to file import and export.
GeometryFunc
Utility class for geometric computations.
Hospital
Represents a hospital point, also used as a Voronoi site.
HospitalCommands
Utility class that contains command line actions related to hospitals.
HospitalZone
Represents a Voronoi zone associated with a hospital.
ImportExportMap
Handles all import and export operations for the map.
MainApp
Main JavaFX application entry point.
MainController
Controller linked to main.fxml via SceneBuilder.
MapCanvas
JavaFX Canvas responsible for drawing the Voronoi diagram, Delaunay triangulation, hospitals and users.
Point
Represents a 2D point with coordinates x and y.
Triangle
represents a triangle in delaunay triangulation
TriangulationDelaunay
Implements the Bowyer-Watson algorithm for Delaunay triangulation.
User
Represent an user (patient) as a point
UserCommands
CLI commands related to users.
VoronoiEngine
Interface defining the core operations of the Voronoi/Delaunay engine.
VoronoiEngineStub
Stub implementation of the Voronoi engine with fake data.
VoronoiMap
represent the map
